response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong overall software engineering maturity across 17 years, they lack the three core mandatory requirements for this role: only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (versus 5-10 years required), no demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle expertise, and zero capital markets or investment banking domain knowledge. Their recent and current work focuses on TypeScript/Node.js and AI infrastructure, and their last C++ engagement was over 11 years ago.
strengths: 17+ years of professional software development experience with proven ability to learn diverse tech stacks and platforms
Strong track record of mentoring, knowledge sharing, and communication through workshops, talks, and team leadership roles
Demonstrated CI/CD pipeline experience and some Java background (partially transferable to enterprise finance environments)
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (at National Instruments in 2014-2015) versus the required 5-10 years, with no C++ work in the past 11 years
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle expertise; SQL experience limited to MongoDB and MySQL in non-mission-critical contexts
Completely absent fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge—no financial services background evident

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets/fixed income domain expertise
